options.text: So… Why were you in the woods?

hi.text:
I got lost on the trail and before I knew it, the sun was down.
 Eventually, I managed to find a road and just hoped that I'd find another person before… Well before something else got to me.

options.text: Mm, you never know nowadays. Even encountered one before I found you.

2.text: That's rough. I wonder how those 'creature' even appear in the first place.

options.text: Still being studied it seems. Otherwise, there's no clue how or why they even show up.

3.text: P: Man, it's already been so long since the world became like this and yet nothing? What are they even doing at this point?

options.text: At least not all of them are malicious.

end.text: P: Hah, I guess that's the silver lining. They're really more of a nuisance than anything.
